steps.title: Compare the origin claims
steps.content: Text 1 argues that Ollantay was probably created in the late 1700s by someone familiar with the Inca past. Text 2 argues that the play itself is an Inca work from the 1500s that was later influenced by Spanish drama.

steps.title: Discard unsupported disputes
steps.content: A asks what inspired a Spanish writer, which neither text discusses. C wrongly assumes an Inca author knew about Spanish plays, and D introduces popularity across centuries, which is not addressed. The answer is B.
